hero.title: I-Innovation Lab
hero.description: Hlola ama-demos asebenzisanayo, izivivinyo, nemibukiso yezobuchwepheshe evela eqenjini lethu lonjiniyela.

hero.title: I-Innovation Lab
hero.description: Sihlola imingcele esebenzayo ku-AI, i-automation, nezinhlelo ezisatshalalisiwe, bese sihumusha ucwaningo oluqinisekisiwe kumakhono okukhiqiza athembekile.

researchAreas.title: Izindawo Zocwaningo
researchAreas.description: Indawo ngayinye yokugxila ihlanganisa ucwaningo lokuhlola nezindlela zokuqalisa ezenzelwe izinhlelo zomhlaba wangempela.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Imininingwane Yokugxila Okuningiliziwe
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Izinhlelo zocwaningo zesikhathi esiseduze njengamanje zisuka ekuqinisekisweni kwezakhiwo kuya ezinhlelweni zokulethwa.

fromLabToProduction.title: Kusuka Lab kuya ekukhiqizeni
fromLabToProduction.description: Ukuqamba ku-Horizon kulinganiswa ngemiphumela ethunyelwe, hhayi ama-prototypes ahlukene.

roadmap.title: I-R &D Roadmap
roadmap.description: Inqubekela phambili esiteji kusuka ekwakhiweni kwamakhono kuya ezinhlelweni ezivumelanisa nezimo, eziqhubekayo ezithuthukayo.

publications.title: Publications & Insights
publications.description: Ukubhala kwezobuchwepheshe kanye namanothi okuqaliswa okuvela emsebenzini oqhubekayo wokuqamba.

appliedAi.title: Izinhlelo ze-AI ezisetshenzisiwe
appliedAi.description: Izakhiwo ze-AI ezigxile ekukhiqizeni ezihlanganisa ukukhonza imodeli, i-orchestration yesici, nokuhlolwa okulawulwayo.

automationFrameworks.title: Izinhlaka ze-automation
automationFrameworks.description: Amathuluzi okuzenzekelayo angaphakathi okuphepha kokuthunyelwa, ukuphendula kwezigameko, kanye nokuhamba komsebenzi kobunjiniyela okuphindaphindiwe.

advancedArchitecture.title: Ukuhlolwa Kwezakhiwo Ezithuthukisiwe
advancedArchitecture.description: Ucwaningo ngezakhiwo eziqinile, ezisatshalaliswa ezilungiselelwe ukusebenza, ukubekezelelana kwamaphutha, kanye nesikali.

edgeAndIot.title: I-Edge Computing ne-IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Ubuhlakani onqenqemeni lwezinqumo ze-latency ephansi, ukucubungula i-telemetry, nokuhlanganiswa kwemikhumbi yamadivayisi.

nlp.title: Ukucubungula Ulimi Lwemvelo
nlp.description: Amapayipi okuqonda izilimi eziningi zokuhlukanisa, ukukhipha, ukuhumusha, nezinhlelo zokuxoxa.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Ama-algorithms wokuziphendukela kwemvelo kanye nokusebenza kahle
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Izinhlelo zokusesha nokusebenza kahle eziphefumulelwe ukukhethwa kwemvelo ukuxazulula izinselelo zobunjiniyela obuphezulu.

automationFrameworks.title: Izinhlaka ze-automation
automationFrameworks.description: Sakha izinhlaka zokuhamba komsebenzi ezihlanganisiwe zokukhishwa kwe-orchestration, amasango ekhwalithi, kanye nokuqinisekiswa kwe-post-deploy ukunciphisa ukungqubuzana kwesandla ngenkathi kuthuthukiswa ukuthembeka.

advancedArchitecture.title: Ukuhlolwa Kwezakhiwo Ezithuthukisiwe
advancedArchitecture.description: Ukuhlolwa kwethu kwezakhiwo kugxile kumasu okubola kwezinsizakalo, amaphethini wokuqina kwesifunda, kanye nezimvilophu zokusebenza kwezinhlelo ezisebenza ngaphansi kwesidingo esiguquguqukayo.

edgeAndIot.title: I-Edge Computing ne-IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Siqinisekisa ukusakazwa komcimbi kanye nemiklamo ye-inference onqenqemeni evumela izinqumo zendawo ezisheshayo ngenkathi sigcina ukulawulwa okuphakathi, ukuhlolwa, kanye nokuphathwa komjikelezo wempilo yemodeli.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Ukuhlelwa Komthamo Wokuguquguquka
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Ama-prototypes welebhu aqinisekisiwe ngokumelene nemithwalo yomsebenzi elinganisiwe bese ehlanganiswa namasu we-autoscaling wepulatifomu.

operationalIntelligence.title: Ubuhlakani bokusebenza
operationalIntelligence.description: Amapayipi e-NLP asuka ekuhlolweni okulawulwayo kuya ekusekeleni ukukhiqizwa komsebenzi wokuhlunga okusheshayo nokuqonda okucacile.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Ukwenza ngcono ezinhlelweni zokulethwa
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Izindlela zokuziphendukela kwemvelo ezihlolwe elabhorethri zihunyushelwa zibe izinjini zokuhlela nokuhlabelwa.

edgeDecisioning.title: Izinqumo ze-Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: Ukuhlolwa kwe-IoT kanye nokuhlolwa kwe-inference onqenqemeni kuqiniswa kumasevisi we-latency ephansi ngezingqinamba eziqinile zokuthembeka.

now.title: Izisekelo ze-AI ezisetshenzisiwe
now.description: Khulisa izifanekiso ezisebenzisekayo, ama-suites wokuhlola, namazinga okubuka kuwo wonke amaqembu emikhiqizo.

next.title: I-Autonomous Engineering Workflows
next.description: Sebenzisa izinhlaka ezizenzakalelayo ezinciphisa ubungozi bokuthunyelwa futhi zinciphise ama-loops wempendulo yokuthumela.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Ubuhlakani be-Edge-Native
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Linganisa izakhiwo ze-hybrid cloud-edge zesikhathi sangempela ezindaweni ezizwela i-latency.

longHorizon.title: Izinhlelo zokusebenza okuqhubekayo
longHorizon.description: Hlanganisa ukuhlola, ukuqapha, nokwenza ngcono ukuze izinhlelo zikwazi ukuzivumelanisa ngokuphepha njengoba izimo zishintsha.

aiReliability.title: Izinhlelo ze-AI zobunjiniyela ezihlala zithembekile ekukhiqizeni
aiReliability.summary: Umbono osebenzayo wokulinganisa ijubane lokuhlola nokuphathwa kokukhiqiza.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Amaphethini wezakhiwo ezisatshalalisiwe zamapulatifomu okukhula okuphezulu
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Amanothi ensimini avela ezivivinyweni zokwakha agxile ekusebenzeni, ukuqina, kanye nokusebenza okulula.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: I-Roadmapping Applied R &D yemiphumela yebhizinisi
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Indlela esihlela ngayo imizamo emisha ukuze okutholakele kuhambe kusuka ku-prototype kuya kunani elilinganiswayo.

cta.title: Yakha nge-Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Sebenzisana nathi ukuqinisekisa imibono yokuvelela ngokushesha futhi uhambise imiqondo efakazelwe ezinhlelweni zokukhiqiza eziphephile, eziguquguqukayo.

hero.title: Izinhlelo ze-AI ezisetshenzisiwe
hero.description: Ukubuka konke okusebenzayo kokuthi i-Horizon iklama, ihambisa futhi isebenze kanjani izinhlelo zokufunda ngomshini kusuka ku-prototype kuya ekukhiqizeni.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Amapayipi wokufunda ngomshini
machineLearningPipelines.description: I-AI yokukhiqiza iqala ngamapayipi akhiqiza kabusha axhumanisa idatha, ukuhlola, ukuqinisekisa, kanye nempendulo.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Amaphethini wokuthunyelwa kwemodeli
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Isu lokuthumela likhethwe ngokususelwa kuzidingo ze-latency, ukugxeka kwebhizinisi, kanye nobunzima bokusebenza.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Imodeli yokusebenza ye-MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Imikhuba ye-MLOps iqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo ze-AI zihlala zithembekile, zilawulwa, futhi ziyakwazi ukusabalala njengoba ukusetshenziswa kukhula.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Ukuqapha nokwethenjelwa
monitoringAndReliability.description: Ukubonwa kuvala i-loop phakathi kokuziphatha kwemodeli nemiphumela yokusebenza.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Ubunjiniyela bedatha nobunjiniyela bezici
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Ukufakwa kwedatha okunguquliwe, ukuhlolwa kwekhwalithi, nezincazelo zezici ezisebenzisekayo kudala isisekelo esithembekile sokuqeqeshwa kwemodeli.

modelDevelopment.title: Ukuthuthukiswa kwemodeli
modelDevelopment.description: Ukuhlolwa kulandelwa ngokucushwa okuphindaphindiwe, amamethrikhi enhloso, kanye nezisekelo zokuqhathanisa ezizenzakalelayo.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Amasango okuqinisekiswa nokuphepha
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Amamodeli wokhetho adlula ukusebenza, ukuqina, nokuhlolwa kwenqubomgomo ngaphambi kokuthi avunyelwe ukukhishwa.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Ama-loops wempendulo yokusebenza
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: I-post-deployment telemetry yazisa izinto eziza kuqala ukuqeqesha kabusha, izinqumo zokubuyisela emuva, nokuhlelwa okulandelayo kwe-iteration.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Izinsizakalo ze-Inference yesikhathi sangempela
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Ama-API we-latency ephansi wezinhlelo zokusebenza ezisebenzisanayo nge-autoscaling, i-caching, kanye nokubuka kwezinga lesicelo.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Izibikezelo ze-Batch ne-Streaming
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Amapayipi ahleliwe futhi aqhutshwa ngumcimbi wokushaya amaphuzu aphezulu kuwo wonke ama-analytics kanye nokuhamba komsebenzi kokusebenza.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Ukuthunyelwa kwe-Edge-Aware
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Amaphethini wokukhonza amafu e-hybrid ezindaweni ezidinga ukuqondiswa kwendawo nokuphathwa kwemodeli ephakathi.

ciCdForModels.title: I-CI / CD yamamodeli
ciCdForModels.description: Ukwakhiwa okuzenzakalelayo, ukuhlola, nokukhipha ukuhamba komsebenzi kunciphisa ubungozi bokuthunyelwa ngenkathi kugcinwa ijubane lokulethwa.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Irejista Yemodeli Nomjikelezo Wokuphila
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Izinto ezifakiwe zemodeli ezinezigaba zokuphromotha, umugqa, kanye nokuvunywa komsebenzi kuthuthukisa ukulawula nokulandelela.

servingInfrastructure.title: Ukukhonza ingqalasizinda
servingInfrastructure.description: Izingqimba zokukhonza ezisezingeni eliphakeme ezinamasu okukhipha afana nokuthunyelwa kwe-canary nesithunzi kusekela ukuphathwa kwezinguquko okuphephile.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: I-latency, i-throughput, kanye nokulandela umkhondo wokusebenza kahle kwezindleko
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Izixwayiso zokubuyiselwa emuva kwekhwalithi yedatha kanye nokulungiswa komsebenzi

cta.title: Linganisa i-AI esetshenzisiwe ngokuzethemba
cta.description: Uma uhlela izinhlelo ze-AI ezidinga imiphumela elinganiswayo nokugcinwa kwesikhathi eside, i-Horizon ingasiza ukuklama nokusebenza komjikelezo ophelele wokuphila kohlelo.

hero.title: I-NLP yezilimi eziningi
hero.description: Hlola amakhono okucubungula ulimi lwemvelo nokuthi akhula kanjani abe yizinhlelo zokukhiqiza ezithembekile, ezikhuluma izilimi eziningi.

foundations.title: Izisekelo ze-NLP
foundations.description: Ukucubungula ulimi lwemvelo kuhlanganisa izimpawu zolimi nokufunda komshini ukukhipha incazelo, inhloso, nesakhiwo embhalweni.

workbench.title: I-NLP Workbench esebenzisanayo
workbench.description: Sebenzisa idemo ukuhlola ukutholwa kolimi, ukushaya imizwa, ukukhishwa kwenhlangano, nokuziphatha kokuhumusha ngesikhathi sangempela.

productionApplications.title: I-Horizon isebenzisa kanjani i-NLP ekukhiqizeni
productionApplications.description: Amakhono e-NLP ahlanganiswe ekuhambeni komsebenzi webhizinisi ngama-guardrails okusebenza kanye namamethrikhi ekhwalithi ecacile.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Izimiso Zokuthembeka Nokubusa
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Ukukhiqizwa kwe-NLP kudinga okungaphezu kwekhwalithi yemodeli; kuncike emikhubeni ephephile yokukhishwa kanye nokuqinisekiswa okuqhubekayo.

foundations.intro1: Izinhlelo zanamuhla ze-NLP zamandla ukusekela i-automation, ukubaluleka kokusesha, ukukhishwa kolwazi, nokusebenzisana kwezilimi eziningi. Ukuqaliswa okusebenzayo kudinga kokubili ikhwalithi yemodeli kanye nokulawulwa okuqinile kokusebenza.
foundations.intro2: E-Horizon, sigxila ezinhlelweni ze-NLP zokuphela kokuphela ezihlanganisa ukuqwashisa okuqinile nokubonakala, ukuphatha, kanye nomthelela wokukhiqiza olinganiswayo.

languageDetection.title: Ukutholwa kolimi
languageDetection.description: Ikhomba ulimi oluvela ezingxenyeni zombhalo omfushane noma omude ukuhambisa izicelo kupayipi lokucubungula elifanele.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Ukuhlaziywa kwemizwa
sentimentAnalysis.description: Ikhipha inhloso engokomzwelo kanye ne-polarity yobuhlakani bamakhasimende, ukuhlukaniswa kokusekela, kanye nama-loops wempendulo yomkhiqizo.

entityExtraction.title: Ukukhishwa kwenhlangano
entityExtraction.description: Ithola izinhlangano ezihlelekile njengamagama, izinkampani, izindawo, nezinsuku ezivela embhalweni ongahlelekile.

translation.title: Ukuhumusha
translation.description: Isekela ukuhamba komsebenzi kwezilimi eziningi ngokuhumusha umbhalo okhiqizwe ngumsebenzisi noma osebenzayo ngenkathi ugcina umongo.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Ukusekela kanye ne-Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Hlukanisa izicelo ezingenayo ngokuphuthumayo, inhloso, kanye nemizwa yokusheshisa umzila nekhwalithi yokuphendula.

governedContentOperations.title: Imisebenzi Yokuqukethwe Okulawulwayo
governedContentOperations.description: Sebenzisa izihlungi zolimi ezinolwazi lwenqubomgomo kanye nokuhlolwa kokulinganisa ngokunemba okulinganisiwe nokukhumbula imigomo.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Imininingwane Yebhizinisi Eqhutshwa Umbhalo
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Hlanganisa amathrendi avela kumadokhumenti, ukubuyekezwa, nokuxhumana ukwazisa amasu nezinqumo zokusebenza.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Ukuhlolwa Ngecala Lokusebenzisa
evaluationByUseCase.description: Amamodeli alinganiswa ngokumelene nedatha eqondene nesizinda ngaphambi kokuba kwenziwe izinqumo zokukhishwa.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Ukuvikelwa komuntu ku-in-the-loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Izibikezelo ezinomthelela omkhulu zifaka izindlela zokubuyekeza, imithetho yokukhuphuka, kanye nezimpawu zokuzethemba ezisobala.

continuousMonitoring.title: Ukuqapha okuqhubekayo
continuousMonitoring.description: I-Drift, i-latency, kanye nokuwohloka kwekhwalithi kulandelwa ngokuqhubekayo ngakho-ke ukuqeqeshwa kabusha nokubuyiselwa emuva kuyasebenza.

hero.title: Ukulingisa kwe-Genetic Algorithm
hero.description: Hlola ukubalwa kokuziphendukela kwemvelo endaweni esebenzisanayo futhi ubone ukuthi izimiso ezifanayo zihumusha kanjani ezinhlelweni zokukhiqiza ukukhiqizwa.

scientificFoundation.title: Isisekelo seSayensi
scientificFoundation.description: Ama-algorithms wezakhi zofuzo ayindlela yokuthuthukisa abantu ephefumulelwe ukukhethwa kwemvelo nokuzivumelanisa nezimo.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Imvelo Yokuziphendukela Kwezinto Ezisebenzisanayo
interactiveEnvironment.description: Sebenzisa ukulingisa ukuze ubone ukuqina kuthuthukise isizukulwane ngesizukulwane futhi ubone ukuthi ingcindezi yokukhetha ithinta kanjani imiphumela.

productionUse.title: I-Horizon isebenzisa kanjani lokhu ekukhiqizeni
productionUse.description: Imishini efanayo yokusesha esetshenziswe kule demo yazisa amapayipi okuthuthukisa asetshenziswa ezinhlelweni zokusebenza.

applicationDomains.title: Izizinda Zohlelo Lokusebenza Ezibanzi
applicationDomains.description: Ukuziphendukela kwemvelo kubaluleke kakhulu ezinhlelweni ezinezinhloso ezinamandla nezingqinamba eziphikisanayo.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Esikhundleni sokufuna isixazululo esisodwa ngesikhathi, ama-algorithms wezakhi zofuzo ashintsha inani elihlukahlukene labantu abakhethiwe. Isizukulwane ngasinye sihlolwa ngokumelene nomsebenzi wokuqina futhi sihlanjululwe ngokukhetha, ukuwela, nokuguqulwa.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Lokhu kubenza baphumelele ezinkingeni eziphezulu ngezingqinamba ezingezona zomugqa, lapho izindlela zokunquma ziba buthakathaka noma zibiza kakhulu.

selection.title: Ukukhethwa
selection.description: Abazongenela ukhetho oluphezulu maningi amathuba okuthi basinde futhi babe nomthelela esizukulwaneni esilandelayo.

crossover.title: I-Crossover
crossover.description: Izimfanelo eziqinile zihlanganiswa kabusha ukudala izixazululo ezintsha ezinamandla ahlanganisiwe.

mutation.title: Ukuguqulwa
mutation.description: Ukungahleliwe okulawulwayo kuletha ukwehluka ukuze ukusesha kungami ezungeze i-optima yendawo.

convergence.title: Ukuhlanganiswa
convergence.description: Ezizukulwaneni eziningi, abantu bathambekele ekuxazululeni izixazululo ezizinzile, ezisezingeni eliphakeme.

resourceScheduling.title: Ukuhlelwa Kwemithombo
resourceScheduling.description: Sisebenzisa amasu okuziphendukela kwemvelo ukwenza ngcono ukuhlelwa kwezingqinamba eziningi lapho ukusesha okunamandla kungenakwenzeka.

architectureTuning.title: Ukulungiswa kwezakhiwo
architectureTuning.description: Ukucushwa kwengqalasizinda yokhetho kuhlolwa ngokuphindaphindiwe ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza nokusebenza kahle kwezindleko.

continuousOptimization.title: Ukwenza kahle okuqhubekayo
continuousOptimization.description: Imisebenzi yokuthuthukisa isebenza kuma-loops alawulwayo ngempendulo ye-telemetry ukuze izinhlelo zivumelane njengoba amaphrofayli okufunwa eshintsha.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Ukuhlelwa komzila kanye ne-Logistics
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Ukulethwa okuyinkimbinkimbi nokuhlelwa kokuthumela kuzuza ekusesheni okuziphendukela kwemvelo lapho izingqinamba zishintsha ngokushesha.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Imodeli kanye ne-Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Ukusesha kwezakhi zofuzo kungathola ukucushwa kwemodeli esezingeni eliphakeme lapho izindawo ezihlosiwe zinomsindo futhi zingahambisani nomugqa.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Izinkinga zephothifoliyo kanye nokwabiwa
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Ukwenza kahle ngaphansi kwemigomo yokuncintisana kungahlelwa njenge-tradeoffs yokuqina kuwo wonke amasethi aguqukayo.
